docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT) FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-02-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-02-2019 BY ANDREW Y.S. CHENG. PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA CRUZ IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: ANDREW Y.S. CHENG; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CYNTHIA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CRUZ, CYNTHIA $1,173.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,258.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ORDER RE: CONTINED FOR PROGRESS REPORT. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CYNTHIA
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-02-2019 - JUDGMENT.
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,346.64 AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CYNTHIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-08-2019 - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO AUG-02-2019 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN INC. REPRESENTED BY MARICRUZ CEDANO, LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT CYNTHIA CRUZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CYNTHIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-08-2019 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-14-2019, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CRUZ, CYNTHIA
